session.assistant: Now refactor the source script. I need to: 1. Add `@click.pass_context` and `ctx: click.Context` param 2. Replace `_get_pr_head_branch` with `github.get_pr()` 3. Replace subprocess cmux pipeline with `cmux` gateway calls 4. Delete `_get_pr_head_branch` function and `import subprocess`
session.tool_result:
1→"""Create a cmux workspace with PR checkout or teleport. 2→ 3→This script creates a cmux workspace that automatically opens a PR 4→and renames the workspace to the PR's head branch. 5→ 6→Usage: 7→ erk exec cmux-open-pr --pr 8152 8→ erk exec cmux-open-pr --pr 8152 --mode teleport 9→ erk exec cmux-open-pr --pr 8152 --branch "my-branch" 10→ 11→Modes: 12→ checkout (default): lightweight -- runs `erk pr checkout {pr} --script` 13→ teleport: heavyweight -- runs `erk pr teleport {pr} --new-slot --script --sync` 14→ 15→Output: 16→ JSON with {success, pr_number, branch, workspace_name} on success 17→ JSON with {success, error} on failure 18→ 19→Exit Codes: 20→ 0: Success - workspace created 21→ 1: Error - cmux/checkout/sync failed or branch lookup failed 22→""" 23→ 24→import json 25→import subprocess 26→from dataclasses import asdict, dataclass 27→ 28→import click 29→ 30→
... [160 lines omitted] ...
42→class CmuxOpenPrError: 43→ """Error response for cmux-open-pr command.""" 46→ error: str 69→ except subprocess.CalledProcessError: 124→ CmuxOpenPrError( 126→ error=f"Failed to detect head branch for PR #{pr}. " 172→ except subprocess.CalledProcessError as e: 173→ error_output = e.stderr.strip() if e.stderr else e.stdout.strip() 177→ CmuxOpenPrError( 179→ error=f"Failed to create cmux workspace: {error_output}",

tool_use.name: Write

The file /home/runner/work/erk/erk/src/erk/cli/commands/exec/scripts/cmux_checkout_workspace.py has been updated. Here's the result of running `cat -n` on a snippet of the edited file: 1→"""Create a cmux workspace with PR checkout or teleport. 2→ 3→This script creates a cmux workspace that automatically opens a PR 4→and renames the workspace to the PR's head branch. 5→ 6→Usage: 7→ erk exec cmux-open-pr --pr 8152 8→ erk exec cmux-open-pr --pr 8152 --mode teleport 9→ erk exec cmux-open-pr --pr 8152 --branch "my-branch" 10→ 11→Modes: 12→ checkout (default): lightweight -- runs `erk pr checkout {pr} --script` 13→ teleport: heavyweight -- runs `erk pr teleport {pr} --new-slot --script --sync` 14→ 15→Output: 16→ JSON with {success, pr_number, branch, workspace_name} on success 17→ JSON with {success, error} on failure 18→ 19→Exit Codes: 20→ 0: Success - workspace created 21→ 1: Error - cmux/checkout/sync failed or branch lookup failed 22→""" 23→ 24→import json 25→from dataclasses import asdict, dataclass 26→ 27→import click 28→ 29→from erk_shared.context.helpers import require_context, require_github, require_repo_root
... [124 lines omitted] ...

213→ def for_test( 214→ *, 215→ github_issues: GitHubIssues | None = None, 216→ git: Git | None = None, 217→ github: LocalGitHub | None = None, 218→ github_admin: GitHubAdmin | None = None, 219→ claude_installation: ClaudeInstallation | None = None, 220→ prompt_executor: PromptExecutor | None = None, 221→ plan_store: PlanBackend | None = None, 222→ remote_github: RemoteGitHub | None = None, 223→ debug: bool = False, 224→ repo_root: Path | None = None, 225→ cwd: Path | None = None, 226→ repo_info: RepoInfo | None = None, 227→ package_info: ErkPackageInfo | None = None, 228→ ) -> ErkContext: 229→ """Create test context with optional pre-configured implementations. 230→ 231→ Provides full control over all context parameters with sensible test defaults 232→ for any unspecified values. Uses fakes by default to avoid subprocess calls. 233→ 234→ Args: 235→ github_issues: Optional GitHubIssues implementation. If None, creates FakeGitHubIssues. 236→ git: Optional Git implementation. If None, creates FakeGit. 237→ github: Optional GitHub implementation. If None, creates FakeLocalGitHub. 238→ claude_installation: ClaudeInstallation or None. Creates FakeClaudeInstallation if None. 239→ prompt_executor: Optional PromptExecutor. If None, creates FakePromptExecutor. 240→ plan_store: Optional PlanBackend. If None, creates PlannedPRBackend. 241→ debug: Whether to enable debug mode (default False). 242→ repo_root: Repository root path (defaults to Path("/fake/repo"))
